title: Immunofluorescence Analysis of Myosin Heavy Chain Isoforms
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.iwjcfcn

steps.title: Cut frozen muscle sections (5 mm)...
steps.instruction: Cut frozen muscle sections (5 mm) in a cryostat on microscope slides.

steps.title: The slides were allowed to reach room temperature
steps.instruction: The slides were allowed to reach room temperature.

steps.title: The slides were permeabilized with 0
steps.instruction: The slides were permeabilized with 0.3% Triton X-100-PBS for 10 min at 4°C.

steps.title: A blocking solution of 5% normal...
steps.instruction: A blocking solution of 5% normal goat serum (NGS)-PBS was applied for 1 h at room temperature.

steps.title: Primary antibodies in 1% NGS-PBS (1:100)...
steps.instruction: Primary antibodies in 1% NGS-PBS (1:100) were applied at 4°C overnight.

steps.title: Three consecutive washes with PBS for 5 min each
steps.instruction: Three consecutive washes with PBS for 5 min each.

steps.title: Secondary antibodies in 1% NGS-PBS (1:500)...
steps.instruction: Secondary antibodies in 1% NGS-PBS (1:500) were applied for 30 min at room temperature.
